description: Another agent already wrote the prompt to do the Trident code review — it's below (see the first comment on this ticket). Execute the Trident (nine-agent) plan review against docs/c11mux-theming-plan.md and fold the findings back into the plan (bumping it to v2). Respect the seven locked §12 decisions on CMUX-9 — do not reopen them. Full instructions, hard constraints, and a drop-in prompt are in the comment below. When done, close this ticket and post a summary on CMUX-9.
title: Trident plan review: CMUX-9 theming plan
